title: Magnified
description: This mod introduces highly customizable zoom functionality.
body:
# Magnified
### Current Mod Features
This mod introduces a zoom functionality and provides a lot of customization. For now, the features include:
- Changeable Zoom Keybind
- Constant Zoom Factor
- Instant Zoom Motion
### Future Mod Features
- Configuration Screen
- Changeable Zoom Factor
- Zoom Animation Types
- Changeable Speed
